name: hope-ai-api
description: Azure Functions v4 (Node.js + TypeScript) backend for HOPE

scripts.build: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/write-version.ps1 && pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/clean.ps1 && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.functions.json && npm run copy
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && npm run copy && npm run verify:layout && func azure functionapp publish hope-ai-api-staging --no-build --source .
scripts.test:regression: ts-node tests/timeline/timelineOrdering.test.ts && ts-node tests/timeline/reconciliation.test.ts && ts-node tests/timeline/timelinePaginator.test.ts && ts-node tests/timeline/globalTimelineRepository.test.ts && ts-node tests/timeline/rowKeyParity.test.ts && ts-node tests/engagements/deriveEngagementStatus.v1.test.ts && ts-node tests/engagements/computeEngagementSummary.test.ts && ts-node tests/formation/formationProfilesRepo.test.ts && ts-node tests/formation/formationReplayOrdering.test.ts && ts-node tests/formation/replayLagDetection.test.ts && ts-node tests/formation/projectionRepairParity.test.ts && ts-node tests/formation/rebuildSnapshotParity.test.ts && ts-node
